text:
Created attachment 253756
www/py-mov-cli-youtube

mov-cli-youtube is a plugin for the mov-cli tool that enables users
to watch YouTube videos directly from the command line. It supports
various features such as searching for videos, downloading audio only
and even accessing YouTube Shorts.

https://github.com/mov-cli/mov-cli-youtube

This port does depend on other ports, i'll add them later.
